title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
